requirement_topic.en: Panama Grid Connection — 120/240 V, 60 Hz and Distributor Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: 巴拿马并网接入——120/240 V、60 Hz及配电公司协调
requirement_topic.zht: 巴拿馬併網接入——120/240 V、60 Hz及配電公司協調

summary.en: Panama is an Americas-style 60 Hz electricity market, with low-voltage service commonly based on 120/240 V arrangements rather than China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline. EV charger installations should be coordinated with the electricity regulator ASEP and the relevant distribution company, commonly EDEMET, EDECHI, or ENSA depending on service territory. Exporters should treat input voltage, phase configuration, earthing, metering, load calculation, service capacity, harmonic impact, and commissioning acceptance as project gates rather than product-label details.
summary.zh: 巴拿马属于美洲式60 Hz电力市场，低压服务通常以120/240 V供电形式为基础，而非中国220/380 V、50 Hz基线。电动汽车充电桩安装应与电力监管机构ASEP及相应配电公司协调，通常为EDEMET、EDECHI或ENSA，具体取决于供电区域。出口商应将输入电压、相制、接地、计量、负荷计算、供电容量、谐波影响及调试验收视为项目门槛，而不是产品铭牌细节。
summary.zht: 巴拿馬屬於美洲式60 Hz電力市場，低壓服務通常以120/240 V供電形式為基礎，而非中國220/380 V、50 Hz基線。電動汽車充電樁安裝應與電力監管機構ASEP及相應配電公司協調，通常為EDEMET、EDECHI或ENSA，具體取決於供電區域。出口商應將輸入電壓、相制、接地、計量、負荷計算、供電容量、諧波影響及調試驗收視為項目門檻，而不是產品銘牌細節。

standards_or_laws: ASEP electricity-sector regulation and technical oversight
Distributor interconnection and service requirements — EDEMET / EDECHI / ENSA
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, harmonics, and power quality
Project-specific electrical installation and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger designs are normally prepared around 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply, GB/T 18487.1-2023 conductive charging requirements, GB/T 20234 connectors, and local China grid-operator acceptance. A China-only 50 Hz design may not have transformer, rectifier, fan, relay, protection, and software ratings documented for 60 Hz Panama service.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩设计通常围绕220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电、GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电要求、GB/T 20234接口，以及中国当地电网运营商验收展开。仅面向中国50 Hz设计的产品，可能没有针对巴拿马60 Hz供电的变压器、整流器、风机、继电器、保护装置及软件额定值文件。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁設計通常圍繞220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電、GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電要求、GB/T 20234接口，以及中國當地電網運營商驗收展開。僅面向中國50 Hz設計的產品，可能沒有針對巴拿馬60 Hz供電的變壓器、整流器、風機、繼電器、保護裝置及軟體額定值文件。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters should confirm: (1) the charger input range supports 120/240 V, 60 Hz or the exact site service; (2) protective devices, leakage detection, RCD/GFCI functions, surge protection, and earthing match the local installation; (3) harmonics and EMC data are available for ASEP, distributor, owner, or engineer review; (4) the installation package includes single-line diagrams, load calculations, metering plan, commissioning procedure, and Spanish labels/manuals where required. A China domestic 220/380 V, 50 Hz evidence package is not enough for Panama deployment.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入范围支持120/240 V、60 Hz或具体站点供电；(2) 保护器件、漏电检测、RCD/GFCI功能、浪涌保护和接地方式与当地安装匹配；(3) 可向ASEP、配电公司、业主或工程师提交谐波及EMC数据；(4) 安装资料包包括单线图、负荷计算、计量方案、调试程序，以及在需要时提供西班牙语标签和手册。中国国内220/380 V、50 Hz证据包不足以支持巴拿马部署。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入範圍支持120/240 V、60 Hz或具體站點供電；(2) 保護器件、漏電檢測、RCD/GFCI功能、浪湧保護和接地方式與當地安裝匹配；(3) 可向ASEP、配電公司、業主或工程師提交諧波及EMC數據；(4) 安裝資料包包括單線圖、負荷計算、計量方案、調試程序，以及在需要時提供西班牙語標籤和手冊。中國國內220/380 V、50 Hz證據包不足以支持巴拿馬部署。

mandatory_status.target: Project gate — ASEP and the relevant distributor should be consulted for grid-connected installations; exact utility approval path depends on site, load, tariff, and service territory
mandatory_status.cn: China grid acceptance applies domestically and does not substitute for Panama 60 Hz input confirmation or local distributor coordination

source.publisher: Autoridad Nacional de los Servicios Públicos (ASEP), Panama

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat the 60 Hz / 120-240 V input and distributor coordination as hard engineering gates. Do not ship a China-only 50 Hz charger package until the exact site voltage, phase, earthing, metering, and distributor acceptance route have been confirmed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将60 Hz / 120-240 V输入及配电公司协调视为硬性工程门槛。在确认具体站点电压、相制、接地、计量及配电公司验收路径前，不应发运仅面向中国50 Hz的充电桩资料包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將60 Hz / 120-240 V輸入及配電公司協調視為硬性工程門檻。在確認具體站點電壓、相制、接地、計量及配電公司驗收路徑前，不應發運僅面向中國50 Hz的充電樁資料包。
